_comment: Medikabazaar company build. Use with: npx ai-command-center start --preset medikabazaar (or set "preset": "medikabazaar" in your config). Add central provider keys and allowedOrigins in your own config file, not here.

branding.name: Medikabazaar AI Command Center
branding.tagline: Centralized AI operations — usage, cost & compliance across every product.
